name: Jana, The Seductive Lifegaurd.
description:
Netori Warning. (Or is this just Reverse NTR? idk.)

Big Tittied Lifeguard gives you Mouth To Mouth, even though you weren't drowning.

A Return to Cinnabus art since I hit 400 Janitor AI Followers and 200 Chub AI Followers.
Also... I guess this fits one of the anon requests I got on Chub. So there you go, guy.

(Male POV only, btw. There's already a Fem Only POV Lifeguard on my acc.)
(Art by Cinnabus)
